Announce.toggleTitleOn: Voice announcements: on (tap to turn off)
Announce.toggleTitleOff: Voice announcements: off (tap to enable — plays a chime and calls the next players when a game ends)
Announce.nextUp: {{court}} finished. {{names}}, you're up — please come on court.
Announce.inAppWarn: You're viewing this page inside {{app}}'s built-in browser — voice announcements will likely play the chime only, without spoken names. Please open this page in Safari or Chrome (look for "Open in browser" under the "⋯" or share menu).
